config.script:
self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.data='' 
	from java.util import Date

	          message='End date cannot be greater than Start Date'

	          system.perspective.print("line 26--->")

	            system.perspective.print("line 50--->")
	          for row in range(cols.getRowCount()):
	              #rowDict = {}
	              for col in range(cols.getColumnCount()):
	               #columnName = cols.getColumnName(col)
	               #system.perspective.print(cols.getValueAt(row, col))

	               #system.perspective.print(columns)
	               self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.columns[colIndex].field = cols.getValueAt(row, col)
	               self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.columns[colIndex].visible=True
	               colIndex=colIndex + 1
	               #system.perspective.print(colIndex)
	               #system.perspective.print(cols.getRowCount())
	               #dataList.append(cols.getValueAt(row, col))
	#                  dataList1=[]
	#                  dataList1=dataList.sort()
	         # system.perspective.print(dataList)
	#                  system.perspective.print(dataList1)
	   
	          
	          oData=system.db.runNamedQuery(namedQuery,
	          {'AreaName':areaName,'LineName':lineName,'FromDate':startDate, 'ToDate':endDate})
	          self.parent.parent.getChild("msgStrip").props.text=oData
	          system.perspective.print("line 73--->")

			     "message": message,

			 scope="view"

import system
	tableData = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntCoordinateTable").getChild("Table").props.data

		csvData = system.dataset.toCSV(tableData, showHeaders=True)
		filePath = system.file.getTempFile("SFCStatusReport.csv")
		system.file.writeFile(filePath, csvData)
		fileName = "SFCStatusReport.csv"
		csvBytes = system.file.readFileAsBytes(filePath)
		system.perspective.download(fileName, csvBytes)
		message='File downloaded Successfully'
		setMessage("Success",message)	
	else:
		message='Please first Retrieve data and then Download excel'
		setMessage("Error",message)	


def setMessage(status,message):
	system.perspective.sendMessage(
	    messageType="setMessage",
   		payload={
        	"message": message,
        	"status": status
    	},
    	scope="view"  
	)

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	source = payload['source']
	action = payload['action']
	rowData = payload['rowData']
	rowIndex = payload['rowIndex']
	column = payload['column']
	if source==self.custom.tableId:
		if action=='update':
			newValue = payload['newValue']
			SerialNumber=rowData['SerialNumber']
			self.refreshBinding("props.data")

# Get the parameters from the message
	message = payload['message']  
	status = payload['status']
	
	# Update the Text Field's text
	self.props.text = message
	self.meta.visible=True
	# Apply the style class (from the payload or a default value)
	self.props.style.classes = "successMsg" if status=='Success' else "errMsg"
